name: HRA_PF_TASK_ROLES_VL
query: SELECT PTRB.PROCESS_TASK_ROLE_ID, PTRB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, PTRB.PROCESS_FLOW_ID, PTRB.TASK_CODE, PTRL.MGR_TASK_NAME, PTRL.WKR_TASK_NAME, PTRB.SEQUENCE_NUMBER, PTRB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PTRB.CREATED_BY, PTRB.CREATION_DATE, PTRB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PTRB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PTRB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PTRB.MODULE_ID FROM HRA_PF_TASK_ROLES_B PTRB, HRA_PF_TASK_ROLES_TL PTRL WHERE PTRB.PROCESS_TASK_ROLE_ID = PTRL.PROCESS_TASK_ROLE_ID AND PTRB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = PTRL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND PTRL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
